blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,466 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
